action: Bind independently verified reviewer identity evidence to the exact authorization, canonical-change proposal, and prior canonical queue blob without permitting automatic adoption.

verification.execution_note: Executed against byte-identical pre-commit files in an isolated Node runtime.

claim_states.observed: A fail-closed reviewer identity binding evaluator and six adversarial tests are committed.
claim_states.inferred: Identity authority and review-content authority must remain separately evidenced and then bound by digest.
claim_states.proposed: Implement post-application verification across the prior queue blob, proposal, reviewer binding, manual commit, and resulting queue blob.
claim_states.superseded: CM-0017's unresolved absence of an executable identity-evidence contract.
claim_states.unresolved: No real provider assertion, cryptographic verification artifact, manual queue application, or post-application proof exists.

privacy_boundary: Public repository state and abstract identity identifiers only. Raw private chat, health information, credentials, identifying personal data, and unreviewed uploads remain excluded.
next_action: Build the post-application verifier; require a real authenticated reviewer assertion and independently retained cryptographic verification artifact before treating any proposal as adopted.
